revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
fix text color in dark mode; this generally works but may cause problems, in which case revert or try specifying a different CSS value
revision.text:
<noinclude>{| class="wikitable"
|-
|</noinclude>style="background: #DFD; color:black; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}"|{{{1|Optional}}}<noinclude>
|}
{{documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass import of programmatically generated pages to give attribution and fill redlinks

Text replacement - "[[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude>" to "<includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>"
Text replacement - "<includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}]]</includeonly>" to "[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}]]"
revision.text: [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Optional]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Optional]]: I am planning on using this template
revision.text: [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Optional]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: fix text color in dark mode; this generally works but may cause problems, in which case revert or try specifying a different CSS value
revision.text:
<noinclude>{| class="wikitable"
|-
|</noinclude>style="background: #DFD; color:black; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}"|{{{1|Optional}}}<noinclude>
|}
{{documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{| class="wikitable" |- |</noinclude>style="background: #DFD; color:black; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}"|{{{1|Optional}}}<noinclude> |} {{documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<noinclude>{| class="wikitable"
|-
|</noinclude>style="background: #DFD; color:black; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}"|{{{1|Optional}}}<noinclude>
|}
{{documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: <noinclude>{| class="wikitable" |- |</noinclude>style="background: #DFD; color:black; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}"|{{{1|Optional}}}<noinclude> |} {{documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}} </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23524127410|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{| class="wikitable" |- |</noinclude>style="background: #DFD; color:black; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}"|{{{1|Optional}}}<noinclude> |} {{documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}} </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<noinclude>{| class="wikitable" |- |</noinclude>style="background: #DFD; color:black; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}"|{{{1|Optional}}}<noinclude> |} {{documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}}
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
